title: Sutera cordata
intro: Sutera cordata, also known as heartleaf or heart-leaf, is a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality due to its calming and sedative effects. The bioactive constituents of Sutera cordata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Sutera cordata is often used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions that are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of insomnia, restlessness, and anxiety.
taxonomy: Sutera cordata is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as the African Violet Orchid or Cordata Sutera. It is native to tropical Africa. Sutera cordata belongs to the order Lamiales and the genus Sutera. The plant is a perennial herb that grows up to 20-30 cm in height. Sutera cordata is often used as an ornamental plant in gardens due to its attractive white and purple flowers.
